'''jazolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabourophobia|kabourophobia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabourophobia|kabourophobia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jazolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæzeleth|jæzeleth]] || [[word:jæzelej|jæzelej]] || [[word:jæzelesh|jæzelesh]] || [[word:jæzele|jæzele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazozoloth|jazozoloth]] || [[word:jazozoloj|jazozoloj]] || [[word:jazozolosh|jazozolosh]] || [[word:jazozolo|jazozolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazoloth|jazoloth]] || [[word:jazoloj|jazoloj]] || [[word:jazolosh|jazolosh]] || [[word:jazolo|jazolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazofloth|jazofloth]] || [[word:jazofloj|jazofloj]] || [[word:jazoflosh|jazoflosh]] || [[word:jazoflof|jazoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jazolotho|jazolotho]] || [[word:jazolojo|jazolojo]] || [[word:jazolosho|jazolosho]] || [[word:jazoloko|jazoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jazoloth|jazoloth]] || [[word:jazoloj|jazoloj]] || [[word:jazolosh|jazolosh]] || [[word:jazolo|jazolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jazolothol|jazolothol]] || [[word:jazolojol|jazolojol]] || [[word:jazoloshol|jazoloshol]] || [[word:jazolokol|jazolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jazolothotho|jazolothotho]] || [[word:jazolojojo|jazolojojo]] || [[word:jazoloshosho|jazoloshosho]] || [[word:jazoloko|jazoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jazolothon|jazolothon]] || [[word:jazolojon|jazolojon]] || [[word:jazoloshon|jazoloshon]] || [[word:jazolokon|jazolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jazolothoro|jazolothoro]] || [[word:jazolojoro|jazolojoro]] || [[word:jazoloshoro|jazoloshoro]] || [[word:jazolokoro|jazolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
